What entities are present on the kitchen counter and how are they arranged?
canonical_answer: A person wearing a pink top and blue apron stands behind a kitchen counter. A white floral teapot sits in the center of the surface. Two silver measuring spoons lie directly in front of the teapot. A blue Whittard tea tin is positioned to the right of the spoons. A white digital timer rests on the left side of the counter.

Describe the visual sequence of the introduction and kitchen setup.
canonical_answer: At 0s, title text displays over floral teapot and cup; at 6s, a person wearing a pink top and blue apron appears behind the counter; at 10s, silver measuring spoons sit in front of the teapot; at 16s, the digital timer and blue tea tin label are clearly visible on the surface.

canonical_answer: She pours the liquid from the floral teapot into a stainless steel thermal carafe.
